chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-125 of 2023. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5900/25. 2. For orders on M.A No.5899/25. 23.09.2025. Mr. Karamullah Memon, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Nabi Bux Laghari, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. Mr. Hakim Ali Shah (Secretary Market Committee Hala). Counsel present for Respondent No.4 has submitted cheque of Rs.60,937/- which shall be submitted with the Additional Registrar of this Court, who upon proper verification & identification shall release the same cheque in favour of the Petitioner. After such statement, learned counsel for Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of Misc Application(s); however, he submits that he would approach to Respondent No.6 (Director Local Funds Audit, Sindh) regarding miscalculation in his pension benefits. Accordingly, the Application(s) are disposed of with directions to the Petitioner to approach Respondent No.6, who shall entertain the Petitioner’s matter in accordance with law/rules. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
